explanations.3: cy.visit() loads a webpage in the browser during the test, similar to typing a URL into the address bar.
explanations.5: cy.contains() finds an element (the 'a' tag, which is a link) that has the text 'Tags' and clicks it.
explanations.7: cy.url().should() checks that the current page's URL contains '/tags', confirming the navigation worked.
explanations.9: cy.get() finds the first h1 heading on the page and verifies it contains the word 'Tags'.
